scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload
scripts.build: bun --cwd frontend install && bun --cwd frontend run build
scripts.lint: bun run lint:frontend && bun run lint:backend
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend && bun run lint && bun tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run pyright
scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && bun run test:backend
scripts.format: prettier --write . && cd backend && uv run ruff format .

backend/**/*.py: cd backend && uv run ruff check --fix
cd backend && uv run ruff format
